episodes.title: First Lady Melania Trump denies ties to Jeffrey Epstein
episodes.description: 'The lies linking me to the disgraceful Jeffrey Epstein need to end today," she said.

episodes.title: Bill Gates to testify before Congress in Epstein probe
episodes.description: Gates has called the time he spent with financier Jeffrey Epstein a "huge mistake."

episodes.title: Allegations against Trump in new Epstein files release
episodes.description: The Department of Justice has posted online portions of three previously missing FBI interviews related to sexual allegations against President Trump

episodes.title: Cult specialist discusses Zizians: Group tied to Seattle woman, nationwide murder investigation
episodes.description:
A group authorities describe as "cult-like" with ties to technology and artificial intelligence is now at the center of a nationwide murder investigation.

READ MORE: https://www.king5.com/article/news/national/seattle-woman-alleged-cult-tied-nationwide-murder-investigation/281-bb7ae018-f719-4560-bfbb-c8a0afdae51e

episodes.title: Jonestown survivor, Congresswoman Jackie Speier talks about her perseverance
episodes.description: From surviving the Jonestown massacre to pushing for gun control as a congresswoman, Jackie Speier continues her fight for others.
